hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '\b(DROP|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM|rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Ask user for confirmation first.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/vaclav/Desktop/eurojob.py/woker && npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude potřebuje tvůj input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
